PUBLISHED  BY  AUTHORITY
No. 15A]
CHENNAI, WEDNESDAY, APRIL 17, 2013
Chithirai 4, Vijaya, Thiruvalluvar Aandu–2044

(Supplement)

GOVERNMENT  OF   TAMIL  NADU

2013
[Price :  Rs. 10.403Paise.
JUDICIAL  NOTIFICATIONS
DTP—VI-1 Sup. (15A)—1
List of Part-I Records to be Destroyed Record Destruction Register of Original Suits for the Year 1980-1984
in the City Civil Court, Chennai-104.
DESTRUCTION OF RECORDS IN THE CITY CIVIL COURT CHENNAI FOR THE YEAR 1980-1984
(Dis No. 4069/2013/R.K.I, dated 3rd April 2013.)
No. VI(1)/209/2013.
It is hereby notified for the information of parties and witnesses that under the rule for the destruction of Part-I records
framed by High Court of judicature at Madras under V of 1917, printed at pages 311 to 317 of the volume I of the Civil Rules
of Practice and circular orders, all documents produced by them and filed as exhibits in the original suits and connected
appeals, original petitions and Applications in the City Civil Court at Chennai mentioned in the schedule hereto and all other
documents which have been tendered but either have not been taken or rejected in the Original Suits. Applications and
Original Petitions mentioned in the said schedule be destroyed after thirty days from the date of publication.
